sigWerErrors.reason: 'at' is a critical part of an email address, replacing it with 'i' makes the email address incorrect and unrecognizable.
Missing 'l' in the spelled-out email address changes the spelling and makes the email address incorrect.
Missing 'o' in the domain part of the email address makes the domain incomplete and incorrect.
